name: @meza/desktop
description: Meza desktop client — real-time encrypted chat

scripts.package:mac: DESKTOP_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @meza/web build && electron-vite build && mkdir -p out/renderer && cp -r ../web/dist/* out/renderer/ && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: DESKTOP_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @meza/web build && electron-vite build && mkdir -p out/renderer && cp -r ../web/dist/* out/renderer/ && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:linux: DESKTOP_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @meza/web build && electron-vite build && mkdir -p out/renderer && cp -r ../web/dist/* out/renderer/ && electron-builder --linux
